ab: Pakafana’en ho kami to cima kiso!
Ci Noami  Kulas kako, mo^tepay to ko mihecaan no mako.
en: My name is Noami Kulas, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: Cima ko ngangan no miso?
Ci Noami Kulas kako.
O maanan a finacadan a wawa kiso?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: O no ’Amis a wawa kako.
Saheto o Yencomin ko palo no loma’ iso han?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Hay, Saheto o ’Amis ko palo no loma’ niyam.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是阿美族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Amis.

ab: Saheto o Yincomin ko palo no  loma’ iso han?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Cowa, o ’Amis ko wama ako, o payrang ko wina ako.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是阿美族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Amis, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: O nima a wawa kiso?
O wawa ni Mayaw Lohok kako.
O wama iso kora han? Pinaay to ko mihecaan ningra?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: ^Enem polo’ to ko mihecaan ningra.
O wama iso kora han? Pinaay to ko mihecaan ningra?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Cowa, o malitengay no niyaro’ niyam cingra , falo polo’ to ko mihecaan ningra.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: Pinaay to ko mihecaan no fa’inayan a kaka iso?
Mo^tep ira ko falo to ko mihecaan no fa’inayan a kaka ako.
Adihayay ko kaikaka no mihecaan to fa’inayan a kaka iso i tisowanan han?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: Lima a mihecaan ko kalala’ed niyam.
Hakowaay ko ka’akawang iso?
Cecay so’ot ira ko sepat polo’ a kongfen ko ’akawang ako.
Halafin to cowa kasasi’araw, ’akawangay to kiso han?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: Hay, Cecay so’ot ira ko tolo polo’ ko ka’akawang ako.
O maso^soay kiso haw?
Cowa, mararaway ko pinengneng iso.
Mangiliway to kiso?
Cowa, maso^soay kako.
Maso^soay kiso haw?
Hay, tolo polo’ to ko tingting ako.
